title: Form and SieveAction missing Hash derive
description: form.rs Form (and lib.rs SieveAction) both derive PartialEq + Eq but not Hash. Rust convention: any type that implements Eq should also implement Hash so it can be used as a HashMap/HashSet key without a wrapper. All constituent types (String, Vec<String>, u64) implement Hash, so Hash is derivable. The absence is a gap callers will hit as soon as they want to deduplicate actions or use a Form as a map key.
